org.moeaframework.core.variable.Permutation

Packages that use Permutation
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation
Collection of operators for permutation variables.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.

  • Uses of Permutation in org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation with parameters of type Permutation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PMX.evolve(Permutation p1, Permutation p2)
    Evolves the specified permutations using the PMX operator.
    void
    Insertion.mutate(Permutation permutation)
    Evolves the specified permutation using the insertion mutation operator.
    void
    Swap.mutate(Permutation permutation)
    Mutates the specified permutation using the swap mutation operator.
